channel.title: Pokemon GO News & Events
channel.description: Official Pokemon GO + GO Hub + LeekDuck

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Fest Global: Final Details, Global Challenges and More Revealed
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global is almost upon us, and Scopely Explore have revealed some final details for the event. Don’t forget, it takes place from Saturday, July 11, to Sunday, July 12, 2026, from 10:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time each day! During each hour of the event, Trainers will have a higher chance […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest Global: Final Details, Global Challenges and More Revealed appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Road of Legends Day 2: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Tyranitar, Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 2: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Tyranitar, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Nickit Community Day (August 2026)
item.description:
The August 2026 Community Day features the cunning little Nickit, the Fox Pokémon and winner of the Community Choice poll! Join the event on Sunday, August 16, 2026, from 2:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time to enjoy 3x Catch Stardust, increased Nickit spawns, and a chance to encounter Shiny Nickit. Evolve Nickit during the […]

The post Nickit Community Day (August 2026) appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Special Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Livestream Announced!
item.description:
Trainers, as we close in on the 10th Anniversary of Pokémon GO, the celebrations only seem to be getting more exciting. Aside from all the in-game grandeur, fans worldwide are in for another major surprise, as a special livestream broadcast has been announced for July 9, 2026! However, to add more spice to the thrill, […]

The post Special Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Livestream Announced! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Road of Legends Day 3: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Gardevoir, Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 3: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Gardevoir, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 4: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Gengar, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Celebration NYC Event: Mewtwo in Times Square
item.description:
Trainers, Scopely is hosting a special livestream to commemorate the 10th Anniversary of Pokémon GO. The company has revealed next to no information about the livestream, but a substantial number of content creators have been invited to New York City to participate in the event. Pokémon GO Hub is among these creators, bringing you live […]

The post Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Celebration NYC Event: Mewtwo in Times Square appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Road of Legends Day 5: All Five-Star Raids, Primal Raids , Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 5: All Five-Star Raids, Primal Raids , Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Saturday Raids
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global takes place from July 11-12, from 10:00 am local time, to 7:00 pm local time on each day. Mega Mewtwo X and Y will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Zeraora! To celebrate 10 years of Pokémon GO, this years Global GO Fest event is FREE for all Trainers! […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Saturday Raids appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Sunday Raids
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global takes place from July 11-12, from 10:00 am local time, to 7:00 pm local time on each day. Mega Mewtwo X and Y will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Zeraora! To celebrate 10 years of Pokémon GO, this years Global GO Fest event is FREE for all Trainers! […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Sunday Raids appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global takes place from July 11-12, from 10:00 am local time, to 7:00 pm local time on each day. Mega Mewtwo X and Y will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Zeraora! To celebrate 10 years of Pokémon GO, this years Global GO Fest event is FREE for all Trainers! […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global Wild Spawns
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global features a large variety of wild Pokémon across six rotating habitats, with each habitat spotlighting three different Pokémon types. While Pokémon from all three types will appear throughout each three-hour block, one type will be featured more frequently during each hour. This guide breaks down every confirmed wild spawn by […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global Wild Spawns appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.
